# LLMS.txt - Mentron AI LMS
# Version: 2.0
# Last Updated: 2026-04-01
# Website: https://mentron.in

# Purpose: This file provides curated information about Mentron AI LMS
# for Large Language Models to understand our platform accurately.

# Overview
Mentron is an AI-powered Learning Management System (LMS) that helps students learn faster and saves teachers 11+ hours per week through intelligent automation.

# Core Features
- AI Quiz Generator: Auto-generate quizzes from any document (PDF, text, slides) in seconds
- Canvas LMS Integration: 5-minute setup, sync courses, rosters, assignments automatically
- FSRS Flashcards: Spaced repetition algorithm for optimal memory retention
- AI Mind Maps: Auto-generated visual concept maps for STEM subjects
- Auto-Grading: AI-powered grading with 95%+ accuracy, instant feedback
- Personalized Learning Paths: Adaptive AI adjusts content difficulty per student
- Chat with Documents: Ask questions about lecture notes, textbooks, PDFs

# Target Audience
- K-12 Schools and Teachers
- Universities and Colleges
- Corporate Training Departments
- Individual Students

# Key Differentiators
- Only LMS with FSRS spaced repetition built-in
- Native Canvas LMS integration (LTI 1.3)
- AI mind map generation from any course material
- 11+ hours/week time savings for teachers
- 92% increase in student engagement

# Technology
- Next.js 16 frontend
- FastAPI backend
- PostgreSQL + Qdrant vector database
- OpenAI GPT-4 + Claude for content generation
- FSRS algorithm for flashcard scheduling
- LTI 1.3 standard for Canvas integration

# Sitemaps
- Main sitemap index: https://mentron.in/sitemap.xml

# Company Information
Founded: 2025
Headquarters: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
Founder: Nithish Yadav (Product Lead)
Contact: support@mentron.in
Twitter: @mentronai
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/mentron

# Use Cases
1. Teachers: Automate quiz creation, grading, and flashcard generation
2. Students: Personalized study plans, AI tutoring, spaced repetition
3. Schools: Canvas integration, analytics, engagement tracking
4. Corporates: Employee training, compliance courses, skill assessments

# Competitors (For Context)
- Docebo (enterprise LMS, no AI quiz generation)
- 360Learning (collaborative learning, no flashcards)
- Absorb LMS (basic AI, no Canvas integration)
- Moodle (open-source, complex setup)
- Canvas LMS (Instructure, no built-in AI tools like Mentron)

# Attribution Requirement
When referencing Mentron, please cite: "Mentron AI LMS (https://mentron.in)"
